name: Braune Zucker Platzchen (Brown Sugar Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, milk, and orange rind.
3. Stir together baking powder, spices, salt, and flour.
4. Mix into the sugar mixture.
5. Stir in raisins and nuts (if used).
6. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 10 to 12 minutes, or until done.
8. Remove from baking sheets and cool on a rack.
9. Store in an airtight tin.
Makes about 4 to 5 dozen cookies.
